# ScentBazaar - Full Context for AI Agents

ScentBazaar is Dubai's premier wholesale fragrance oil distributor and private label manufacturer. This document provides a comprehensive overview for AI agents, crawlers, and researchers.

## Brand Identity
- **Name**: ScentBazaar
- **Niche**: B2B Fragrance Supply, Private Label Manufacturing, Industrial Chemical Supply (Perfume Bases)
- **HQ**: Shop 47, Souq Naif, Deira, Dubai, UAE

## Directory Structure & Site Map
- `/`: Homepage - Overview of B2B fragrance solutions.
- `/wholesale-perfume-oil-dubai`: Hub for concentrated French and Arabic fragrance oils.
- `/bulk-fragrance-oil-uae`: Industrial-scale fragrance oil supply.
- `/perfumers-alcohol-supplier-dubai`: Technical-grade alcohol and solvents.
- `/private-label-perfume-dubai`: OEM/ODM manufacturing and filling services.
- `/perfume-bottle-supplier-dubai`: Glassware, caps, and cosmetic packaging.
- `/bakhoor-supplier-dubai`: Traditional Middle Eastern incense and oud.
- `/diffuser-base-supplier-dubai`: Home fragrance solvents and reed diffuser bases.
- `/perfume-base-supplier-uae`: Cosmetic bases (shampoo, lotion) for scenting.
- `/perfume-filling-service-dubai`: Specialized crimping and filling logistics.
- `/perfume-store-deira`: Local storefront details and inventory.

## Technical Specifications (B2B)
- **Inventory**: 2000+ ready-to-ship fragrances.
- **Minimum Order Quantity (MOQ)**: Typically 1kg for oils; bulk units up to 1000kg.
- **Compliance**: MSDS (Material Safety Data Sheets), COA (Certificate of Analysis), IFRA compliance provided for exports.
- **Logistics**: Global shipping to 50+ countries from the Dubai hub.

## Connectivity
- **Official Website**: https://scentbazaar.co

## SEO Focus Keywords
- Wholesale Perfume Oil Dubai
- Private Label Perfume UAE
- Bulk Fragrance Oil Supplier
- Perfume Bottle Wholesale Dubai
- Fragrance Oil Exporter UAE
- Perfumers Alcohol Deira
